title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.20 — AMBER 3-GANG STAGE ASSEMBLY + EMERALD SWITCH. The per-stage enable was cheated in as a 26x12 chip drawn on top of each tube tile; it is now its own EMERALD square pushbutton at the head of each stage row: [ON square][tube][era]. New EmeraldSwitch component (UIComponents.h): Soviet-60s square illuminated pushbutton — heavy black bakelite shroud tapering to a deep-set square lens, emerald lamp with bloom/spill when ON, dead olive-black plastic when OFF, grimed crevices. Rows 4-5 (DRIVE|TONE, MIX|HARDWARE) stay on the standard 2-col STD grid (layoutGrid gained a startRow offset). Catalog is now: HERO (full row), STD (half row), and the stage assembly [SQUARE + 2x medium]. VERIFY IN ABLETON: each AMBER tube row reads [green square][tube][era]; the squares light emerald when their stage is on and go dead when off; tube/era legends still fit at the narrower width; rows 4-5 still align. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; should the emerald squares also die when the whole AMBER module is bypassed?
